message:
refactor(e2e): add per-scenario CARGO_TARGET_DIR isolation and run_rch_cargo helper

All E2E test scripts now:
- Set a scenario-specific CARGO_TARGET_DIR (e.g. target/rch-e2e-ft1i2ge-4-5)
  to prevent concurrent E2E runs from stomping each other's build artifacts,
  while respecting an inherited CARGO_TARGET_DIR if one is already set
- Use a new `run_rch_cargo` helper that passes CARGO_TARGET_DIR through
  the rch exec environment, replacing the previous pattern of inlining
  `run_rch exec -- cargo` at each call site

Affected scripts: test_ft_1i2ge_4_5, test_ft_1i2ge_4_7, test_ft_1i2ge_6_2,
test_ft_1i2ge_6_4, test_ft_2dss0, test_ft_3hbv9, test_ft_3kxe_1,
test_ft_nu4_4_3_2

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,15 @@ CORRELATION_ID="${SCENARIO_ID}-$(date +%s)"
 LOG_DIR="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ft-e2e-${SCENARIO_ID}"
 mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
 
+DEFAULT_CARGO_TARGET_DIR="target/rch-e2e-ft1i2ge-4-5"
+INHERITED_CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-}"
+if [[ -n "${INHERITED_CARGO_TARGET_DIR}" && "${INHERITED_CARGO_TARGET_DIR}" != /* ]]; then
+    CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${INHERITED_CARGO_TARGET_DIR}"
+else
+    CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${DEFAULT_CARGO_TARGET_DIR}"
+fi
+export CARGO_TARGET_DIR
+
 log_structured() {
     local outcome="$1" reason_code="$2" error_code="${3:-}" extra="${4:-}"
     printf '{"timestamp":"%s","component":"%s","scenario_id":"%s","correlation_id":"%s","outcome":"%s","reason_code":"%s","error_code":"%s"%s}\n' \
@@ -38,6 +47,10 @@ run_rch() {
     TMPDIR=/tmp rch "$@"
 }
 
+run_rch_cargo() {
+    run_rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR}" cargo "$@"
+}
+
 probe_has_reachable_workers() {
     grep -Eiq '"status"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"(ok|healthy|reachable)"' "$1"
 }
@@ -80,7 +93,7 @@ if [[ $probe_rc -ne 0 ]] || ! probe_has_reachable_workers "$RCH_PROBE_LOG"; then
 fi
 
 set +e
-run_rch exec -- cargo check --help >"$RCH_SMOKE_LOG" 2>&1
+run_rch_cargo check --help >"$RCH_SMOKE_LOG" 2>&1
 smoke_rc=$?
 set -e
 check_rch_fallback_in_logs "rch_remote_smoke" "$RCH_SMOKE_LOG"
@@ -91,7 +104,7 @@ if [[ $smoke_rc -ne 0 ]]; then
     exit 1
 fi
 
-CARGO_CMD="run_rch exec -- cargo"
+CARGO_CMD="run_rch_cargo"
 
 echo "=== E2E: ${SCENARIO_ID} — Conflict Detection & Deconfliction ==="
 echo "    cargo_cmd=${CARGO_CMD}"

@@ -247,7 +248,7 @@ run_rch_guarded \
